nasb.text: The pig, because it divides the hoof but does not chew the cud, it is unclean for you. You shall not eat any of their flesh nor touch their carcasses.

esv.text: And the pig, because it parts the hoof but does not chew the cud, is unclean for you. Their flesh you shall not eat, and their carcasses you shall not touch.

cnv.text: 至於豬，因為牠分蹄卻不反芻，就對你們不潔淨。牠們的肉，你們不可吃；牠們的屍體，你們不可觸摸。

ccb.text: 你们也不可吃猪，因为猪虽蹄子分瓣但不反刍，是不洁净的。你们不可吃这些动物的肉，也不可摸它们的尸体。
